heroHeadline: Day 38: Iran Formally Rejects All US War Demands as Trump Plans to Reveal F-15E Rescue Mission Details
heroSubtitle: Tehran rebuffs all US ultimatums in a clear diplomatic deadlock signal, while new details emerge on the CSAR recovery of the F-15E WSO shot down April 3–5 over Iran.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox.
